properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Isn't strange how Jesus Works on things? He'll let satan take you To the last mile of the way, But just remember, Jesus' still there.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Stand firm, Take Jesus at His Word Rest assured in your heart, He will bring you through, Hold on, He will never fail, Just kneel in Him in prayer, Faith takes its unmovable stand.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And the test has to come, Remember Jesus on the cross, He died to bore our sin, our shame, He redeemed His Bride, Every child that comes to Him, He puts him through a test.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Suffering, suffering, It is where your victory comes, Test and trials, test and trials, It is where your victory comes.
